title: Soil Viral Extraction Protocol for ssDNA & dsDNA Viruses
author: Gary Trubl
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tzzep76

steps.title: In 4°C cold room, add 25 ml of AKC' buffer
steps.instruction: In 4°C cold room, add 25 ml of AKC' buffer. undetermined sample needs to be supersaturated; need to record how much you recover

steps.title: Place on shaker at 400 rpm...
steps.instruction: Place on shaker at 400 rpm for 15 minutes at 4°C 00:15:00

steps.title: In 4°C cold room, add 25 ml of AKC' buffer
steps.instruction: In 4°C cold room, add 25 ml of AKC' buffer. undetermined This needs to be done on the same initial soil material for a total of three resuspensions. sample needs to be supersaturated; need to record how much you recover

steps.title: Place on a shaker at 400...
steps.instruction: Place on a shaker at 400 rpm for 15 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes for 20 minutes at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes for 20 minutes at 15,000 g at 4°C to pellet soil and plant debris

steps.title: Pipet supernatant into a new 50 ml tube
steps.instruction: Pipet supernatant into a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: In 4°C cold room, add 25 ml of AKC' buffer
steps.instruction: In 4°C cold room, add 25 ml of AKC' buffer . undetermined sample needs to be supersaturated; need to record how much you recover This needs to be on the same initial soul material again for a total of three resuspensions

steps.title: Place on a shaker at 400...
steps.instruction: Place on a shaker at 400 rpm for 15 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Vortex tubes for 1 min on the highest setting
steps.instruction: Vortex tubes for 1 min on the highest setting. (1/3) 00:01:00

steps.title: Vortex tubes for 1 min on highest setting (2/3) 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Vortex tubes for 1 min on highest setting (2/3) 00:01:00

steps.title: Vortex tubes for 1 min on highest setting (3/3) 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Vortex tubes for 1 min on highest setting (3/3) 00:01:00

steps.title: Shake manually for 30 s at 4°C
steps.instruction: Shake manually for 30 s at 4°C.

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes for 20 minutes at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes for 20 minutes at 15,000 g at 4°C to pellet soil and plant debris.

steps.title: Pipet supernatant into a new 50 ml tube
steps.instruction: Pipet supernatant into a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: Have all supernatant collected into one tube
steps.instruction: Have all supernatant collected into one tube.

steps.title: Filter supernatant with a 0
steps.instruction: Filter supernatant with a 0.22 or 0.45 µm vacuum filter into new 50 ml tubes to remove microbes. 0.22 µm may lose larger viruses, but increase microbial contamination use fewer filters to loose fewer viruses; filter type affects viral recovery

steps.title: Store the filtrate at 4°C overnight
steps.instruction: Store the filtrate at 4°C overnight.

steps.title: DNase samples
steps.instruction: DNase samples

steps.title: Incubate 2 ml of 1% BSA...
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 ml of 1% BSA on Amicon filter for 1 hour undetermined 01:00:00

steps.title: Centrifuge filters at 1,000 g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge filters at 1,000 g for 10 min (or until all BSA filters through) . 00:10:00

steps.title: Wash filters by centrifuging filters with...
steps.instruction: Wash filters by centrifuging filters with 2 ml 1x PBS at 1,000g for 10 min (or until all PBS is filtered through). undetermined 00:10:00

steps.title: Concentrate samples with Amicon filters (to ~5ml for CsCl purification)
steps.instruction: Concentrate samples with Amicon filters (to ~5ml for CsCl purification).

steps.title: Store at 4°C overnight
steps.instruction: Store at 4°C overnight.

steps.title: DNA elutes in 100 µl
steps.instruction: DNA elutes in 100 µl

steps.title: Put some DNA into a new...
steps.instruction: Put some DNA into a new tube for a working sample.

steps.title: Check microbial contamination with qPCR 16S analyses (~3 µl)
steps.instruction: Check microbial contamination with qPCR 16S analyses (~3 µl).

steps.title: Quantify DNA with PicoGreen or Qubit (~2 µl)
steps.instruction: Quantify DNA with PicoGreen or Qubit (~2 µl).

steps.title: NanoDrop for DNA purity (~2 µl)
steps.instruction: NanoDrop for DNA purity (~2 µl).

steps.title: You need 50 µl for shearing...
steps.instruction: You need 50 µl for shearing if you're using Swift kit (for ssDNA viruses; otherwise Nextera XT for dsDNA viruses).

steps.title: If you need to resize the...
steps.instruction: If you need to resize the DNA you can use AMPure beads (same ones that are used in the Swift kit) or a Pippin prep.

steps.title: Shake manually for 30 s at 4°C
steps.instruction: Shake manually for 30 s at 4°C.

steps.title: Shake manually for 30 s at 4°C
steps.instruction: Shake manually for 30 s at 4°C.

steps.title: DNA extraction using PowerSoil DNA extraction...
steps.instruction: DNA extraction using PowerSoil DNA extraction kit; you don’t need the beads, but still use the bead solution; do alternative heat lysis (see attachemnt for notes)
